scene.message: Ayase: What just happened?{waitkey}{nl} What's going on?{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Most likely, yes.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Hm. That's about right.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Wow~{nl} So coool~{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Wh-what's that?!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Hey!{nl} Isn't that...{waitkey}{ret}
Ms. Saeko: Tomomi!!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: I bet Ayase looks{nl} like some awful monster.{waitkey}{ret}
The "Demon's Mirror"{nl} transformed into a shield!{waitkey}{ret}
Got the "Spiegel Shield"!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: I'm the one who{nl} ought to be
